_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section.
_comment_scope: Every AC is verified by a concrete grep / file-existence check against README.md after the follow-up execution bundle rewrites it. All entries are kind=manual: this is a documentation bundle with no scripts of its own, and the checks are short shell one-liners with a clear pass/fail reading.

steps: From the repo root, run the command above.
Confirm the output is four non-empty lines: the '# Toaster' heading followed by exactly three content lines.
Confirm that within those three content lines the phrase 'transcript-first' appears alongside either 'video' or 'audio'.
Any badge row must not push the tagline past line 3 of the content lines; if it does, AC-001-a FAILS.
From the repo root, run the command above.
Confirm the output is exactly 'OK'.
Visually confirm the Quickstart section contains a markdown link whose target is 'docs/build.md'.
Visually confirm the Quickstart section references 'scripts/launch-toaster-monitored.ps1' (either as a code span or a markdown link).
From the repo root, run the command above.
Confirm the output is exactly 'OK' (Evals section contains a link whose target begins with 'scripts/eval').
Read the Evals section and confirm at least one sentence describes what the eval suite covers (edit quality, audio boundary, caption parity, verifier suite, local-LLM gate, multi-backend parity).
From the repo root, run the command above.
Confirm the output is exactly 'OK'.
Visually confirm the Roadmap section links to 'features/product-map-v1/PRD.md' and does not inline the Milestone 3 table.
From the repo root, run the command above.
The output is 'TOTAL|FOOTER' where TOTAL is the total 'Handy' match count in README.md and FOOTER is the count inside the Acknowledgments section.
PASS requires TOTAL <= 1 AND TOTAL == FOOTER (every Handy mention, if any, sits inside the Acknowledgments footer).
Any other value (e.g. '3|1' or '2|0') FAILS AC-002-a.

AC-002-b.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$r=Get-Content README.md -Raw; $bad=@(); foreach ($m in [regex]::Matches($r,'\[[^\]]+\]\(([^)#]+?)(?:#[^)]*)?\)')) { $u=$m.Groups[1].Value; if ($u -match '^(https?:|mailto:)') { continue }; $p=Join-Path (Resolve-Path .).Path $u; if (-not (Test-Path $p)) { $bad += $u } }; if ($bad.Count -eq 0) { 'OK' } else { 'FAIL: ' + ($bad -join ', ') }"
steps: From the repo root, run the command above.
Output 'OK' means every relative markdown link target (ignoring http(s):// and mailto:) resolves to a real file or directory.
Output 'FAIL: <list>' identifies every unresolved target; AC-002-b fails until all are fixed.

AC-003-a.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$r=Get-Content README.md -Raw; $bad=@(); foreach ($m in [regex]::Matches($r,'!\[[^\]]*\]\(([^)]+)\)')) { if ($m.Groups[1].Value -match '(?i)Handy') { $bad += $m.Groups[1].Value } }; foreach ($m in [regex]::Matches($r,'\[!\[[^\]]*\]\([^)]+\)\]\(([^)]+)\)')) { if ($m.Groups[1].Value -match '(?i)Handy') { $bad += $m.Groups[1].Value } }; if ($bad.Count -eq 0) { 'OK' } else { 'FAIL: ' + ($bad -join ', ') }"
steps: From the repo root, run the command above.
Output 'OK' means no image-link or badge-link URL contains the string 'Handy' (case-insensitive).
Output 'FAIL: <list>' enumerates every offending badge URL; AC-003-a fails until they are removed or repointed at Toaster-owned URLs.
